rulings.Case Title: WILLIE PAYTON VS. MARCELLA FLORES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Alfredo Flores, Sr.; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 19, 2017, line 3. PLAINTIFF WILLIE PAYTON's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Alfredo Flores, Sr. GRANTED. Complete verified responses to Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production at issue in this motion must be delivered to Plaintiff's counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,050. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 19, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT ROBERT RIVERA, JEFFREY KENT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED.Moving party failed to shift its burden and establish that there are no triable issues of fact regarding Defendants relationship with Plaintiff and obligation to pay rent for the use of the Premises. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERMAN UMANZOR ET AL VS. NERY L SCHOTT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admission From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 19, 2017, line 6. PLAINTIFF HERMAN UMANZOR, FLOR UMANZOR's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admission From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 3 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,110. = (501/REQ)
